abilities.description: Visage drains the movement and attack speed of the targeted unit, gaining it for itself and nearby familiars.
abilities.name: Grave Chill
abilities.story: The warmth of the sun is never felt in the dark cold of the Narrow Maze.

abilities.description: Visage gathers charges of soul essence each time nearby heroes take more than 100 damage. When the essence is released, it deals base damage as well as damage for each gathered soul charge.
params: Passive ComponentDamage Gather Radius: [picture:aoe_radius_symbol] 1800Charge Gain Damage Threshold: 100Max Charges: 3/4/5/6Damage Timer Duration: 6
abilities.name: Soul Assumption
abilities.story: The collected souls of the dead reach out to bring another into their fold.

abilities.description: Visage generates a layered barrier that protects him from damage. If he receives damage from a player, one layer is removed, and takes time to recover.
params: Passive ComponentAura Radius: 900Max Layers: 4Damage Reduction per Layer: 8%/12%/16%/20%Damage Reduction Cap: 80%Min Damage Threshold: 40Layer Recharge Time: 6/5/4/3Aura Linger Duration: 0.5[picture:talent_tree_symbol] Armor Bonus: 10
abilities.name: Gravekeeper's Cloak
abilities.story: Visage's tough scales share equal properties of ghost and stone, making it nearly impervious to blade and magical assault.

abilities.description: After a short delay, the nearest Familiar turns into stone and smashes into the ground, stunning and damaging all targets in the area. The Familiar becomes invulnerable, and will regain its health very rapidly. After 6 seconds, the Familiar will automatically leave Stone Form.
abilities.name: Stone Form

abilities.description: Turns Visage and familiars invisible, granting Visage bonus movement speed and upgrading its movement type to flying. When Visage or its familiars leave invisibility they deal more damage for 4 seconds. Lasts 35 seconds. Invisibility ends when attacking or casting.
abilities.name: Silent as the Grave

abilities.description: Conjures blind Familiars to fight for Visage. Familiars possess the Stone Form ability, that allows them to turn into stone, stunning enemies upon landing. While in Stone Form, Familiars are invulnerable, and rapidly regenerate their health. Familiars grant high bounty when killed.
abilities.name: Summon Familiars
abilities.story: Guardians of the Narrow Maze, Necro'lic's Familiars stand watch over his domain.

abilities.description: Grants certain talent bonuses to Visage and his Familiars.
abilities.name: Familiar Talents

abilities.description: After a short delay, the Familiar turns into stone and smashes into the ground, stunning and damaging all targets in the area. The Familiar becomes invulnerable, and will regain its health very rapidly. After 6 seconds, the Familiar will automatically leave Stone Form.
abilities.name: Stone Form

description: Scouts and attacks with his familiars. Perched atop the Narrow Maze was Visage, a dreadful gargoyle form to which the eternal spirit Necro'lic was bound. Tasked with hunting down those who escape the afterlife, Visage instills Grave Chill in his prey, impairing them while augmenting his speed. He reaps their essence with Soul Assumption, gathering energy from the anguish they felt before releasing it in a devastating attack. Protected by the Gravekeeper's Cloak, the gargoyle's ablative layers deflect both steel and spells. His deadly Familiars scout the land for runaways as Silent as the Grave. On his command, they harass their prey, dropping down to earth as Stone Statues to restrain the captive for their master's impending arrival.  Support Nuker Durable Disabler Pusher  Blue, Flying, Wings, Nose Legs ( 2 )
trivia: Visage has one of the most numerous ability remakes in the game, with Grave Chill being his only mainstay: Soul Assumption, in an earlier version, was an autocast enabled attack modifier where he will deal bonus damage and steal the life of his enemies upon death, healing him and leaving no corpse. Gravekeeper's Cloak used to be a passive aura where allies in the area will be healed when Visage takes damage, physical or magical. Raise Revenants, his former ultimate, lets him summon up to eight pitch-black, gargoyle-shaped spirits from a corpse. It was likely changed because of it being a very effective scouting tool that makes map control easier. The Revenants had good vision range, a flying attribute, and can be resummoned easily since the ability neither cost a lot of mana nor had a long cooldown. This, along with the fact that the Revenants did not do a lot of damage on their own (attack modifier limits their damage to one-third the stated amount against heroes) and no special abilities give them very limited usage in combat situations.

Gravekeeper's Cloak used to be a passive aura where allies in the area will be healed when Visage takes damage, physical or magical.

Raise Revenants, his former ultimate, lets him summon up to eight pitch-black, gargoyle-shaped spirits from a corpse. It was likely changed because of it being a very effective scouting tool that makes map control easier. The Revenants had good vision range, a flying attribute, and can be resummoned easily since the ability neither cost a lot of mana nor had a long cooldown. This, along with the fact that the Revenants did not do a lot of damage on their own (attack modifier limits their damage to one-third the stated amount against heroes) and no special abilities give them very limited usage in combat situations.

hero_talents.talent_left: +1 Armor Corruption to Visage and Familiars
